object-cover object-top"}],["$","div",null,{"children":[["$","p",null,{"className":"font-semibold text-stone-700 dark:text-stone-200 text-sm group-hover:text-orange-600 transition-colors","children":"Mia Collins"}],["$","p",null,{"className":"text-xs text-stone-400","children":"Workspace Designer"}]]}]]}],["$","span",null,{"className":"flex items-center gap-1","children":[["$","$L6",null,{"ref":"$undefined","iconNode":[["circle",{"cx":"12","cy":"12","r":"10","key":"1mglay"}],["path",{"d":"M12 6v6l4 2","key":"mmk7yg"}]],"className":"lucide-clock","size":13}]," ","8 min read"]}],["$","span",null,{"children":"February 21, 2026"}]]}]]}],["$","div",null,{"className":"grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-10 pb-16","children":[["$","article",null,{"className":"lg:col-span-2","children":[["$","p",null,{"className":"text-xl text-stone-600 leading-relaxed mb-6 font-medium pl-4 border-l-4 border-orange-500","children":"You do not need to spend a fortune to build a home office that works. This guide covers the best gear at every price point — and the prioritisation that gets you 90% of the benefit at 30% of the cost."}],["$","p",null,{"className":"text-xs text-stone-500 dark:text-stone-400 mb-8 p-3 rounded-lg bg-stone-100 dark:bg-stone-900 border border-stone-200 dark:border-stone-800","children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Affiliate disclosure:"}]," This post may contain affiliate links to products we recommend. We earn a small commission when you buy through them, at no extra cost to you. As an Amazon Associate we earn from qualifying purchases. See our ",["$","$L7",null,{"href":"/disclaimer","className":"text-orange-600 dark:text-orange-400 hover:underline","children":"disclaimer"}]," for details."]}],["$","div",null,{"className":"prose","children":[["$","h2","0",{"id":"the-smart-way-to-build-a-budget-home-office","children":"The Smart Way to Build a Budget Home Office"}],"$L29","$L2a","$L2b","$L2c","$L2d","$L2e","$L2f","$L30","$L31","$L32","$L33","$L34","$L35","$L36","$L37","$L38","$L39","$L3a","$L3b","$L3c","$L3d","$L3e","$L3f","$L40","$L41","$L42","$L43","$L44"]}],"$L45","$L46","$L47"]}],"$L48"]}]]}]
49:I[94097,["/_next/static/chunks/0wjbooevnfpw4.js","/_next/static/chunks/0wu484j-81s3l.js"],"default"]
4a:I[24170,["/_next/static/chunks/0wjbooevnfpw4.js","/_next/static/chunks/0wu484j-81s3l.js"],"default"]
4b:I[55132,["/_next/static/chunks/0wjbooevnfpw4.js","/_next/static/chunks/0wu484j-81s3l.js"],"default"]
:HL["https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1484480974693-6ca0a78fb36b?w=1200&h=800&fit=crop&auto=format&q=80","image"]
:HL["https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1484788984921-03950022c9ef?w=1200&h=800&fit=crop&auto=format&q=80","image"]
29:["$","p","1",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"The worst home office advice targets people with unlimited budgets. The second-worst advice tells you to spend as little as possible on everything. The right approach is strategic: understand which elements have the highest ergonomic and productivity impact, spend proportionally more on those, and make smart trade-offs on the rest."}}]
2a:["$","p","2",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"This guide covers a complete home office setup under £500 — with priorities clearly explained."}}]
2b:["$","h2","3",{"id":"priority-1-the-chair-150-200","children":"Priority 1: The Chair (£150–200)"}]
2c:["$","p","4",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"Nothing has more impact on your daily work quality than what you sit in for eight hours. A poor chair causes chronic discomfort that accumulates over months and years. It is also the area with the worst quality-to-price ratio at the budget end of the market."}}]
2d:["$","p","5",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"The best budget option is the <strong>Hbada Ergonomic Office Chair (~£150)</strong>. Mesh back, lumbar support, adjustable armrests, and seat height. Not at the level of a Herman Miller, but significantly better than anything cheaper."}}]
2e:["$","p","6",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"If you can find a used Steelcase or Herman Miller within budget, prioritise that over new budget chairs every time. Check Facebook Marketplace and office liquidation sales — companies upgrade office furniture regularly."}}]
2f:["$","h2","7",{"id":"priority-2-monitor-150-200","children":"Priority 2: Monitor (£150–200)"}]
30:["$","p","8",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"A good monitor reduces eye strain, makes reading and writing more comfortable, and increases effective screen real estate. At minimum: 27 inches, 1440p resolution, IPS panel."}}]
31:["$","p","9",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"<strong>Best value: LG 27MK600M (~£200)</strong>. IPS panel, 1440p, 75Hz, good colour accuracy. Everything a home office monitor needs without premium features you will not use."}}]
32:["$","h2","10",{"id":"priority-3-desk-60-100","children":"Priority 3: Desk (£60–100)"}]
33:["$","p","11",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"The desk is primarily a surface. For a budget setup, the <strong>IKEA LINNMON / ALEX combination (~£80)</strong> remains one of the best value options available: a large surface, integrated drawer storage, and solid legs."}}]
34:["$","p","12",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"The LINNMON is MDF-based and not the most premium material, but it is entirely adequate for home office use. If you want a step up, the <strong>IKEA KARLBY countertop on ALEX legs (~£150)</strong> uses real wood and feels substantially better."}}]
35:["$","h2","13",{"id":"priority-4-keyboard-and-mouse-50-80-combined","children":"Priority 4: Keyboard and Mouse (£50–80 combined)"}]
36:["$","p","14",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"<strong>Keyboard</strong>: The <strong>Keychron C3 Pro (~£35)</strong> is an excellent wired mechanical keyboard. For wireless, the Keychron K2 (~£75) is worth the stretch."}}]
37:["$","p","15",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"<strong>Mouse</strong>: The <strong>Logitech M705 (~£35)</strong> offers wireless connectivity, a comfortable shape, and excellent tracking at a very reasonable price."}}]
38:["$","h2","16",{"id":"priority-5-lighting-30-50","children":"Priority 5: Lighting (£30–50)"}]
39:["$","p","17",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"A single overhead light is not enough for comfortable extended work. Add a desk lamp with adjustable colour temperature (~£25–40). For video calls, a simple LED ring light or panel (~£20–30) transforms your appearance on camera."}}]
3a:["$","h2","18",{"id":"complete-budget-build-under-500","children":"Complete Budget Build: Under £500"}]
3b:["$","ul","19",{"children":[["$","li","0",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"Chair: Hbada Ergonomic — £150"}}],["$","li","1",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"Monitor: LG 27MK600M — £200"}}],["$","li","2",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"Desk: IKEA LINNMON/ALEX — £80"}}],["$","li","3",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"Keyboard: Keychron C3 Pro — £35"}}],["$","li","4",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"Mouse: Logitech M705 — £35"}}],["$","li","5",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"Total: approximately £500"}}]]}]
3c:["$","p","20",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"This covers the essentials. If you already own a desk, redirect that budget to the chair and monitor."}}]
3d:["$","h2","21",{"id":"what-to-skip-at-this-budget","children":"What to Skip at This Budget"}]
3e:["$","p","22",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"<strong>Monitor arm</strong>: Useful, but a monitor with a good built-in stand suffices initially. Add one later (~£40 for a basic arm)."}}]
3f:["$","p","23",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"<strong>Premium mechanical keyboard</strong>: A good entry-level mechanical is fine. Upgrade when you have experienced the difference."}}]
40:["$","p","24",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"<strong>Herman Miller new</strong>: Buy used if budget allows. Brand new is not necessary — these chairs last decades."}}]
41:["$","h2","25",{"id":"the-upgrade-path","children":"The Upgrade Path"}]
42:["$","p","26",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"Once you are earning from your home office and can reinvest:"}}]
43:["$","ol","27",{"children":[["$","li","0",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"<strong>Chair upgrade</strong>: Herman Miller Aeron (used, ~£400–600) or Steelcase Leap V2"}}],["$","li","1",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"<strong>Monitor upgrade</strong>: 32-inch 4K with USB-C (~£450)"}}],["$","li","2",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"<strong>Monitor arm</strong>: Ergotron LX (~£120)"}}],["$","li","3",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"<strong>Keyboard upgrade</strong>: Keychron Q2 Pro (~£170) or similar"}}]]}]
44:["$","p","28",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"For a deep dive on which gear has the most impact, read our <a href=\"/blog/best-desk-setup-for-productivity\" class=\"text-orange-600 dark:text-orange-400 hover:underline font-medium\">complete desk setup guide</a>."}}]
45:["$","div",null,{"className":"mt-10 pt-8 border-t border-stone-200 dark:border-stone-800 flex flex-wrap items-center gap-3","children":[["$","span",null,{"className":"text-sm font-medium 25:[["$","title","0",{"children":"Budget Home Office Setup: The Best Gear Under £500 in 2026"}],["$","meta","1",{"name":"description","content":"You do not need to spend a fortune to build a home office that works. This guide covers the best gear at every price point — and the prioritisation that gets you 90% of the benefit at 30% of the cost."}],["$","meta","6",{"property":"og:url","content":"https://deskbly.com/blog/budget-home-office-setup"}],["$","meta","7",{"property":"og:image","content":"https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1593642634367-d91a135587b5?w=1200&h=800&fit=crop&auto=format&q=80"}],["$","meta","8",{"property":"og:image:width","content":"1200"}],["$","meta","9",{"property":"og:image:height","content":"800"}],["$","meta","10",{"property":"og:image:alt","content":"Budget Home Office Setup: The Best Gear Under £500 in 2026"}],["$","meta","11",{"property":"og:type","content":"article"}],["$","meta","12",{"property":"article:published_time","content":"2026-02-21"}],["$","meta","13",{"property":"article:modified_time","content":"2026-02-21"}],["$","meta","14",{"property":"article:author","content":"Mia Collins"}],["$","meta","15",{"property":"article:section","content":"Workspace"}],["$","meta","16",{"property":"article:tag","content":"budget"}],["$","meta","17",{"property":"article:tag","content":"home-office"}],["$","meta","18",{"property":"article:tag","content":"setup-guide"}],["$","meta","19",{"property":"article:tag","content":"buying-guide"}],["$","meta","20",{"property":"article:tag","content":"value"}],["$","meta","21",{"name":"twitter:card","content":"summary_large_image"}],["$","meta","22",{"name":"twitter:title","content":"Budget Home Office Setup: The Best Gear Under £500 in 2026"}],["$","meta","23",{"name":"twitter:description","content":"You do not need to spend a fortune to build a home office that works. This guide covers the best gear at every price point — and the prioritisation that gets you 90% of the benefit at 30% of the cost."}],["$","meta","24",{"name":"twitter:image","content":"https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1593642634367-d91a135587b5?w=1200&h=800&fit=crop&auto=format&q=80"}],["$","link","25",{"rel":"icon","href":"/icon?c0b95df96f490973","alt":"$undefined","type":"image/png","sizes":"32x32"}],["$","link","26",{"rel":"apple-touch-icon","href":"/apple-icon?f7f63e177608d30c","alt":"$undefined","type":"image/png","sizes":"180x180"}],["$","$L4d","27",{}]]
